environment.envExample:
# Demo-only credentials. Do not reuse these values outside local/generated verification.
TOPOGRAM_AUTH_PROFILE=bearer_demo
TOPOGRAM_AUTH_TOKEN=topogram-todo-demo-token
TOPOGRAM_AUTH_USER_ID=11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111
TOPOGRAM_AUTH_PERMISSIONS=*
PUBLIC_TOPOGRAM_DEMO_AUTH_TOKEN=topogram-todo-demo-token
PUBLIC_TOPOGRAM_AUTH_USER_ID=11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111
PUBLIC_TOPOGRAM_AUTH_PERMISSIONS=*
PUBLIC_TOPOGRAM_DEMO_PRIMARY_ID=33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333333333
PUBLIC_TOPOGRAM_DEMO_CONTAINER_ID=22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222
TOPOGRAM_DEMO_PRIMARY_ID=33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333333333
TOPOGRAM_DEMO_CONTAINER_ID=22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222
environment.name: Todo Local Runtime Stack

runtimeCheck.name: Todo Runtime Check Plan
notes: Mutating checks create, update, complete, and archive a runtime-check task.
Export checks submit a task export job, verify job status, and verify the download endpoint.
Runtime checks also verify the generated project and user lookup endpoints.
Later stages are skipped if environment readiness fails.
The generated server exposes both `/health` and `/ready`.
Use the smoke bundle for a faster minimal confidence check.
Use this runtime-check bundle for richer staged verification and JSON reporting.

stageNotes.summary: required env, web readiness, API health, API readiness, and DB-backed seeded task lookup
core task happy paths, export/job flows, generated lookup endpoints, and important negative cases
